channel.title: Private Link on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Private Link on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Standard service endpoint
item.description:
Standard service endpoint is in public preview. It provides a more scalable and secure way to connect IaaS workloads to Azure PaaS services within the Private Link family, addressing scale and management limits of earlier approaches.

  • Source: Azure Updates

item.title: azure: [Launched] Generally Available: Private Connectivity for Azure AI Search and Foundry Knowledge Bases
item.description:
Azure AI Search and Foundry Knowledge Bases now support private end-to-end network connectivity between search resources and Foundry services. Traffic for ingestion, enrichment, retrieval, and agent operations can be routed over Shared Private Link or Network Security Perimeter.

  • Source: Azure Updates
